data.summary: [12/17 Temporary Maintenance Notice] There is temporary maintenance scheduled today on 12/17 (Wed).
data.body:
[12/17 Temporary Maintenance Notice]

There is temporary maintenance scheduled today on 12/17 (Wed).
Please note that the game will be unavailable during this time.

🗓️Maintenance Period: 12/17(Wed) 5:00 AM ~ 6:00 AM (UTC)
➡️Details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3217&thread=3311798

※ Maintenance times may change based on conditions.
